error.capacity_details: lava %d bits, vuswikoti lebyikulu eka k=1 i %d bits
error.empty_coefficients: xilayi xa coefficient a xi nge vi na nchumu
error.empty_password: password a yi nge vi na nchumu
error.header_embed_failed: swi tsandzekile ku nghenisa nhlokomhaka ya rungula: %v
error.insufficient_capacity: rungula lerikulu swinene eka vuswikoti bya xiringaniso lebyi nga kona
error.insufficient_coefficients: tikhoyifisiyense leti nga enelangiki hi nkarhi wa ku nghenisa: lava %d, ku kume %d
error.insufficient_header_coefficients: tikhoyifisiyense leti tirhisiwaka leti nga enelangiki ta ku nghenisa nhlokomhaka: swi lava 32 wa tibiti, ku kumiwile ntsena %d tikhoyifisiyense leti tirhisiwaka
error.invalid_code_word: rito ra khodi a ri nge vi na nchumu
error.invalid_coefficient_range: nhlayo ya xiringaniso ehandle ka mpimo lowu tirhaka (-2048 ku ya eka 2047) .
error.invalid_force_k: invalid ForceK: yi fanele ku va 0 (auto) kumbe 1-8
error.invalid_k_parameter: k parameter yi fanele ku va exikarhi ka 1 na 8
error.matrix_encode_failed: ku khoda ka matiriki ku tsandzekile eka rito ra khodi: %v
error.message_too_large: mpimo wa rungula wu tlula mpimo lowukulu lowu pfumeleriweke (8,388,607 wa tibayiti) .
error.nil_random_source: xihlovo xa xitshuketa a xi nge vi nil: tirhisa InitializePRNG(password) kumbe u nyika RandomSource leyi byariweke ka ha ri emahlweni
error.permutation_failed: ku tsandzekile ku humesa ku cinca-cinca ka xiringaniso: %v

log.k_selected: Parameter ya k leyinene yi hlawuriwile
log.permutation_generated: Ku cinca-cinca ka xiringaniso ku tumbuluxiwile
log.shrinkage_detected: Ku hunguteka ku kumiwile, ku tlhela ku nghenisiwa bit
